siteFooter.tagline: A seeded voxel world protocol on Solana.

login.title: NICECHUNK Wallet Login

status.walletDetected: Solana wallet detected. Choose one to connect.
status.noWallet: No injected wallet detected. Open this page in a wallet app, or install Phantom.
status.networkSwitching: Requesting wallet network switch to Solana {network}...
status.networkMismatch: NiceChunk requires Solana {expected}, but your wallet reports {detected}. Switch networks and reconnect.
status.networkSwitchFailed: Wallet network switch failed. Switch to Solana {expected} in your wallet, then reconnect.
status.networkSwitchUnsupported: Your wallet does not support automatic network switching. Switch to Solana {expected} in wallet settings, then reconnect.
status.publicKeyMissing: The wallet did not return a public key.
status.profile: Wallet connected. Set your player name.
status.invalidUsername: Player name must be 3-18 characters and can use letters, numbers, underscores, or Chinese characters.
status.signingChallenge: Confirm the login message in your wallet.
status.signatureFailed: Wallet signature could not be verified. Please try again.
status.proofCopied: Login proof copied. Return to your browser and complete wallet login.
status.proofCopyFailed: Could not copy the login proof. Please use Return to browser.
status.noCopiedProof: No copied NiceChunk login proof was found.
status.proofSelectReady: Login proof selected. Copy it, then return to your browser.
status.pasteProofReady: Paste your wallet signature proof to finish login when the wallet does not return automatically.
status.resourceFailed: Login resources failed to load. Refresh and try again.

loading.videoFallback: Using poster image while video loading is unavailable.
loading.worldBody: Loading player session, terrain engine, and first visible chunks.

visualFallback.title: Visual fallback active
visualFallback.body: Using poster image while video loading is unavailable.

route.title: Opening game client
route.body: Handing your wallet session to the world gateway.

login.pasteProofAction: Paste signed proof to finish login
login.pasteProofPlaceholder: Paste the signature proof that starts with nicechunk-proof:
